name: hermes-agent
description: Autonomous TypeScript agent for discovering recently funded startup founders, enriching their public profiles, and sending structured Telegram updates.

scripts.check: npx sqlite3 data/hermes.db 'SELECT founder_name, company_name, funding_source, tech_category, linkedin_url, twitter_url, careers_url, engineering_hiring_signal, sent_at FROM founders ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;'
scripts.spend: npx sqlite3 data/hermes.db 'SELECT ROUND(SUM(cost_usd), 6) as total_spent FROM api_usage;'
